message:
🐛 Fix stale closure in useTrendHistory addPoint callback (#2311)

* 🐛 Fix stale closure in useTrendHistory addPoint callback

addPoint captured `history` in its closure, so rapid calls all
referenced the same stale array, overwriting each other's points.
Use a ref to always access the latest history value.

Fixes #2231

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Make historyRef source of truth for rapid addPoint calls

Address Copilot review: historyRef.current was only updated from React
state during render, so multiple addPoint calls before a re-render
would each read the same stale array. Now addPoint updates
historyRef.current immediately after computing newHistory, ensuring
successive calls each see the previous call's result.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
